homeTitle: New Orleans Tours | Self-Guided Black History, Culture & Walking Routes
homeDescription: Explore Black New Orleans through self-guided walking tours with maps, narration, and routes across Tremé, Congo Square, Claiborne, arts institutions, and civil-rights landmarks.
catalogTitle: New Orleans Walking Tours | Black History & Culture Routes
catalogDescription: Browse self-guided New Orleans routes built around Tremé culture, Congo Square origins, Claiborne memory, Black arts institutions, and civil-rights history.
homePanelTitle: See New Orleans through rhythm, memory, and neighborhood power.
homePanelBody: Start with a self-guided route through second lines, freedom ground, Bayou Road commerce, Black arts institutions, and the civic spaces where New Orleans history keeps moving.
